name: wukong-public-staging
description: Coordinator-only Wukong public staging bundle for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinator contract and public release staging bundle.
interface.longDescription: Wukong is a coordinator contract for Codex workflows, not an official OpenAI product. This public staging bundle ships sanitized skills, templates, contracts, and local validation helpers.
defaultPrompt: Set up Wukong for a new project with a project-control document.
Show me the coordinator-only task package and historian handoff flow.
Validate that a Chang'e design task is blocked without Product Design invocation evidence.
